name: Audit Investigator
description: Drills into historical audit trail records to reconstruct configuration changes, approvals, and admin actions.

inputs.name: service
inputs.description: Optional Genesys Cloud service name (e.g., routing, analytics).

inputs.name: entityId
inputs.description: Optional entity identifier (queue, flow, user) to filter the audit records.

inputs.name: userId
inputs.description: Optional user identifier that initiated the actions.

steps.description: Submit an audit query with the specified filters.
Page through the resulting audit transaction until completion.

outputs.summary: Chronological timeline with change summaries and actors.
outputs.raw: Raw audit events for JSONL export.
